text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai is here. Oguri Cap won't be racing
today because of an injury, but Super Creek, who
Yaeno Muteki raced at the Kikuka Sho, is
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno is looking to build her reputation in this.
She promises to light her obsession while keeping
both blaze fierce and water still in perfect
balance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She boasts that the audience will only have eyes
for her.
